title: 菊花賞の後に・秋晴れの下で

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek has gotten her racing groove back
and smiles, knowing that she's able to race
vigorously once more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While she is unable to win the Kikuka Sho, she
has learned a lot through the Classic races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She leaves the Classics behind and we decide to
tackle the Nakayama racecourse winter race—the
Arima Kinen!
